mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(r.role_name SEPARATOR ','), '') AS role_names FROM user u LEFT JOIN dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, phone, dept_id, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{deptId}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM user WHERE user_id IN
#{id}
